prestazioni: Engine: Ford 351 Cleveland (351C) V8, stroked to 408ci (6.7L) using a forged Eagle 4340 crankshaft (4.00" stroke), Manley H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and JE forged pistons (11.5:1 compression) with Total Seal rings for boost resilience. Camshaft: Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292°/298° duration, .580"/.590" lift hydraulic roller with hardened pushrods and Scorpion roller rockers for valvetrain stability at 7,500 RPM.

Forced Induction: Single Precision Turbo PT6766CE .82 A/R turbocharger with a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifold (equal-length, 1.75" primaries) and Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate. Intercooled with a Bell Intercoolers 4.5" core front-mount unit (12" x 24" x 3.5") and dual 3.5" silicone couplers. Fueling: Holley Dominator EFI system with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (base 58 psi, rising to 100 psi under boost).

Drivetrain: ZF 5-speed transaxle (Type 905) reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential and upgraded with a Tilton twin-disc clutch (240mm, 3,000 lb-ft capacity). Custom half-shafts by The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" chromoly, CV-jointed) to handle 800+ lb-ft torque. Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 200mm travel) with custom-valved springs (450 lb/in front, 550 lb/in rear) and spherical bearing mounts. Brakes: Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers (40mm pistons) with 380mm two-piece rotors (floating, slotted) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with Goodridge G-Stop braided lines.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom GT5-S-specific Rocket Bunny/Pandem kit (extended fenders, front splitter, and ducktail spoiler) with dry carbon construction (1.5mm thickness) and integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling. Front bumper modified with a custom 3D-printed ABS splitter (2.5" overhang) and tow hooks (Aeromotive, anodized gold).

Aero: Custom rear diffuser (3D-printed PETG, 3-stage design) with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5" titanium Borla Pro XS mufflers (straight-pipe, 409 stainless tips). Hood: Seibon carbon fiber with a 2.5" cowl induction scoop (functional, feeding the Holley intake) and custom hood pins (AeroCatch, quick-release). Side skirts: Custom aluminum extrusion (1.25" thick) with integrated LED turn signals (Lux H8, amber).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (Rosen Europe) with GT5-S-specific stitching (orange contrast) and custom door cards (carbon fiber, 2mm thickness). Seats: Bride Zeta IV (fixed-back, FIA-spec) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Steering wheel: NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub (Momo pattern) and custom horn button (De Tomaso logo, CNC-machined aluminum). Gauges: Stack ST8100 digital dash (12,000 RPM redline, boost/vacuum, oil temp/pressure) with AEM X-Series wideband controller (0-5V output).
